model_info._backfill_note: Pre-Codex-2026-05-14 F2 fix. The Claude shim now persists _model_info from every API call; this row predates that emit so resolved_model and usage are not recoverable. requested_model is set to the shim-level alias (haiku for v1, sonnet for v2) which is what the post-fix shim emits.

summary: The prettier formatting check failed because the file packages/react-dom/src/__tests__/ReactDOMFragmentRefs-test.js contains unformatted code that does not match prettier's style requirements.
root_cause: The file packages/react-dom/src/__tests__/ReactDOMFragmentRefs-test.js was not formatted according to prettier's rules.

evidence.quote:
This project uses prettier to format all JavaScript code.
    Please run yarn prettier-all and add changes to files listed below to your commit:


packages/react-dom/src/__tests__/ReactDOMFragmentRefs-test.js
evidence.reason: The prettier check script explicitly identified the file with formatting violations and instructed the user to run yarn prettier-all to fix them.

evidence.quote: error Command failed with exit code 1.
evidence.reason: The prettier check command exited with a non-zero status code, indicating a formatting failure.

suggested_fix: Run yarn prettier-all to format the code, then commit the changes to packages/react-dom/src/__tests__/ReactDOMFragmentRefs-test.js.
